summary: Dual Payment System implementation verified. All 10 backend tests passed. Key features: Cart page loads at /reseller/cart, customer/admin payment endpoints return proper 400/500 errors when Stripe not configured, order creation includes both customer_payment and admin_payment fields with correct amounts.
critical_code_review_comments: StylingPage.jsx handleAddToCart (line 520-558): Correctly shows toast and does NOT navigate away - user can continue adding items
WIPOrdersPage.jsx confirmPlaceOrder (line 553-612): Uses admin_payment.amount_due first, falls back to total_reseller_cost - correct amount for admin payment
WIPOrdersPage.jsx payment modal (line 988-1008): Shows 'Amount to Pay (Your Cost)' with admin cost, not customer price
CartPage.jsx handleSaveToWIP (line 130-166): Creates orders with both total_customer_price and total_reseller_cost (as total_admin_cost)
Backend orders.py create_order (line 74-139): Correctly stores customer_payment.total_amount and admin_payment.amount_due fields
Backend payment.py customer endpoint (line 261-339): Uses reseller's Stripe keys, returns 400 if not configured
Backend payment.py admin endpoint (line 79-162): Uses admin's Stripe keys, returns 500 if not configured
seed_data_creation: Used test_dual_payment_system.py to create test orders for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dual payment system backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_dual_payment_system.py. All 10 tests pass. Customer payment uses reseller's Stripe keys, admin payment uses admin's Stripe keys. Both return proper errors when Stripe not configured. Order creation stores customer_payment.total_amount (customer price) and admin_payment.amount_due (reseller cost).

cart_page_loads.details: Cart page loads with empty cart message, header shows '0 items • Total: ₹0'

add_to_cart_no_navigate.test: StylingPage Add to Cart does NOT navigate away
add_to_cart_no_navigate.details: handleAddToCart() at line 520-558 shows toast.success() with 'View Cart' action button, does NOT call navigate() directly

customer_payment_endpoint.test: /api/payment/customer/create-checkout-session returns proper error when Stripe not configured
customer_payment_endpoint.details: Returns 400 with 'Reseller Stripe not configured' when reseller_settings has no stripe keys

admin_payment_endpoint.test: /api/payment/checkout/create-session returns proper error when Stripe not configured
admin_payment_endpoint.details: Returns 500 with 'Stripe not configured' when admin Stripe keys not set

wip_orders_payment_amount.test: WIPOrdersPage payment modal shows correct admin payment amount
wip_orders_payment_amount.details: Payment modal at line 988-1008 shows admin_payment.amount_due or total_reseller_cost, explicitly states 'This is admin cost + admin margin (excludes your profit margin)'

order_creation_pricing.test: Order creation includes both customer_payment.total_amount and admin_payment.amount_due
order_creation_pricing.details: Backend test verified order created with customer_payment.total_amount=10000 and admin_payment.amount_due=6000 (reseller cost)

cart_save_to_wip.test: Cart page 'Save to WIP' creates orders correctly
cart_save_to_wip.details: handleSaveToWIP() at line 130-166 sends total_customer_price and total_reseller_cost (as total_admin_cost) to /orders endpoint

backend_tests_summary.TestCustomerPaymentEndpoint::test_custom: PASS - Returns 400/404 when Stripe not configured
backend_tests_summary.TestAdminPaymentEndpoint::test_admin_pay: PASS - Returns 500 when Stripe not configured
backend_tests_summary.TestOrderCreation::test_order_creation_i: PASS - Order has customer_payment and admin_payment
backend_tests_summary.TestOrderCreation::test_order_creation_c: PASS - Calculates totals from item pricing
